input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.9.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.9.1.3
            TITLE: normally open

            CONTENT:
            rule T.9.1.3: Normally Open
T.9.1.3 Normally Open 
A type of electrical relay or contactor that allows current flow only in the energized state

final_answer: rule T.9.1.3: Normally Open T.9.1.3 Normally Open A type of electrical relay or contactor that allows current flow only in the energized state
